title: Open Writing Practices
summary: An open textbook covering rhetorical awareness, drafting, revision, and source integration.
suggestedUse: Use chapters as weekly readings and adapt revision activities into low-stakes assignments.

title: Introduction to Research Methods
summary: Foundational methods text focused on qualitative and quantitative research design.
suggestedUse: Map each unit to syllabus methods outcomes and pair with locally relevant datasets.

title: Critical Thinking Toolkit
summary: Reusable classroom activities for evaluating arguments, evidence, and claims.
suggestedUse: Select 2-3 activities as formative checks before major writing assignments.

title: College Success Skills
summary: A student success text with modules on time management, information literacy, and study strategies.
suggestedUse: Integrate targeted modules to support first-year seminars and assignment scaffolding.

title: Communication in the Real World
summary: Comprehensive communication text with public speaking, interpersonal, and group communication units.
suggestedUse: Replace expensive communication text and assign chapter-aligned discussion prompts.

title: Data Literacy Essentials
summary: Short modules on reading graphs, data interpretation, and ethical data communication.
suggestedUse: Embed modules into LMS as pre-lab resources for research and methods courses.
